query:
ALTER TABLE claims MODIFY workflow_state ENUM(
  'created',
  'intake_verified',
  'assigned',
  'under_assessment',
  'internal_review',
  'technical_approval',
  'financial_decision',
  'payment_authorized',
  'closed',
  'disputed'
) DEFAULT 'created';
